title: Anakin Solo's lightsaber

{{Quote|Weapon of the Solo we killed at Myrkr. Conveyed to Yuuzhan'tar by the traitor Vergere, wielded by the Jeedai Ganner against so many of my warriors, retrieved when he died and brought to me, now yours to confront.|Shimrra Jamaane to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Anakin Solo's lightsaber''' was a violet-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] that was created and wielded by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Solo]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It played an important role in the outcome of the war while in the hands of Anakin and many others after his death.

==History==
[[File:ASbS.jpg|thumb|left|230px|Anakin with his lightsaber shortly before his death in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].]]
During his early Jedi training, Anakin was part of a group of Jedi that retrieved [[Obi-Wan Kenobi's third lightsaber/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's third lightsaber]] from [[Orloc]].<ref name="Kenobi's Blade">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]''</ref> While the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Invasion of Yavin 4|occupied]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], Anakin added a [[Lambent]] crystal that he harvested into his lightsaber. This allowed Anakin to use "[[Vongsense]]," which allowed him to perceive the Vong and their creations. Anakin Solo's lightsaber had a special affinity to the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]].<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

===Anakin Solo's death===
In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] Anakin led a [[Myrkr strike team|team]] of Jedi on a [[Mission to Myrkr|mission]] to destroy the [[Voxyn]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility on the [[Koros-Strohna]] ''[[Baanu Rass]]''. Though he fought valiantly, he died in combat with Yuuzhan Vong to protect his [[Solo twins|siblings]] and fellow Jedi. His lightsaber was soon after taken by [[Nom Anor]].

===Yuuzhan'tar===
[[File:GannersLastStand.jpg|thumb|right|170px|Ganner Rhysode wielding Anakin's lightsaber at the entrance to the World Brain.]]
During the Mission to Myrkr [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] was also captured and taken to the Yuuzhan Vong occupied [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While in Vong captivity, Jacen was offered Anakin's lightsaber in an attempt to turn him to the [[True Way]]. Jacen accepted, but deceived them when he lied of his conversion.

[[Ganner Rhysode]] came to rescue Jacen and used Anakin's lightsaber to [[Battle of the World-Well|kill]] countless Yuuzhan Vong warriors, while Jacen sabotaged the [[World Brain]]. Ganner was killed in combat and the lightsaber was taken yet again by Nom Anor. Later was used by [[Master Shaper]] [[Qelah Kwaad]] to demonstrate [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]] improvements of [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun armor]] on her newly [[Shaping protocol|shaped]] Yuuzhan Vong [[Slayers|elite soldiers]] then again taken by Nom Anor, who presented it to Shimrra.

===Second Battle of Coruscant===
During the Second Battle of Coruscant, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] confronted Shimrra. As they fought, Shimrra mocked Luke with his nephew's lightsaber. To the astonishment and dismay of Shimrra, Luke used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to pull the lightsaber to him, and then used it to decapitate the Dread Lord.

===End of the war===
With Shimrra dead, the Yuuzhan Vong surrendered and left for the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] with [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. As the newly liberated [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] celebrated peace, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] drove Anakin's lightsaber into [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] memorial tree on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], saying farewell to both of them.

{{Weapon-stub}}
